```{.r .cell-code}
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
setwd("~/scripts/rrg/r-scripts/iso")

df <- read.csv('vcu_alex.csv') |>
  drop_na() |>
  slice(-42) |>
  mutate(across(c(Isometric.Fee, Isometric.Fee.1, Buffer.Fee, tCO2e), ~ as.numeric(str_remove_all(.x, "[$,]"))))

df2 <- read.csv('vcu_cost.csv') |>
  slice(-1) |>
  mutate(Year = as.numeric(Year)) |>
  filter(Year <= 2066) |>
  select(-X.1) |>
  mutate(Cost = as.numeric(str_remove(Cost, "\\$")))

me <- left_join(df, df2, by = "Year")


p <- df |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Isometric.Fee.1), color = "green", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line(aes(y = Buffer.Fee), color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line(aes(y = tCO2e), color = "blue", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(aes(y = tCO2e, color = "Mg Co2e"), shape = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(y = Isometric.Fee.1, color = "Isometric Fee"),  shape = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(y = Buffer.Fee, color = "Buffer Fee"),shape = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Isometric and Buffer Pool Fees", y = "") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::dollar_format()) 

print(p)

ggsave('vcu-model.png', width = 16, height = 6)

p1 <- df |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Year)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = Year.Gain, color = "Year Gain"),  shape = 2) 
```
:::
